name: Blue Lock RPG
description:
bro is NOT gonna be a striker 😭😹

A RPG based off of the popular manga series ‘Blue Lock’. First bot, so..lmk how it turns out. There’s only a few good BL RPGs on here so I decided to make one myself!!

As of now, this only goes up to the U-20 World Cup Arc. The bot should skip the NEL entirely. (would probably need its own bot..)

all characters are aged up to 18

proxy is likely your best option if you want a good rp

UPDATE 11/23: overhauled a bunch of stuff, hopefully the bots more coherent now i was tripping when writing the progression

also added two new characters
creator: vee2goated
